Class DRComponent

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.component.DRComponent
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIComponent, Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
DRBreak, DRDimensionComponent
public abstract class DRComponent extends Object implements DRIComponent

Abstract DRComponent class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
